phase: Phase 3 (round-3 strip fix + artifact hygiene + full regen)

round3_fixes.NEW-1: CRITICAL: disclaimer strip Phase 2 over-aggressive fix. _ALLERGEN_ADJACENT_TO_DISCLAIMER now searches only last-120-char window ending at cut+80, not the full raw string. Prevents 'מכיל חיידקי יוגורט' standalone culture declarations from being consumed as the strip boundary. Regression test RT-2.10..RT-2.15 added and passing.
round3_fixes.NEW-2: CRITICAL: stale BSIP2 trace for 7290112346797 (Activia Oat Plum) deleted from run_yogurt_006/products/. Batch runner now has source-path guard: all loaded products must have _source_path inside BSIP1_SOURCE — no fallback to prior run files.
round3_fixes.NEW-3_artifact_hygiene: run_yogurt_006_recal_p0_trim/run_record.json marked SUPERSEDED/REFERENCE_ONLY. This reports/run_yogurt_006_run_record.json regenerated from FINAL shipped frontend.

task249_fixes.RT-2: disclaimer strip: 63/88 products stripped with CORRECT boundary (nutrition-table anchor, not standalone מכיל)
task249_fixes.RT-5: E414 added to ADDITIVE_TERMS; paren scan active
task249_fixes.RT-12: FERMENTATION_TERMS updated; has_live_cultures corrected for bio/probiotic subtypes
task249_fixes.RT-7: serving_size_g populated from weight_g for single-serve containers
task249_fixes.RT-10: barcode 7290102395231 ingredient_text_quality=marketing_bleed; sweetener from prose not scored

task250_rulings.Ruling_3: REJECTED by orchestrator — standard round-then-grade retained (34.8→35→D; 49.9→50→C)
task250_rulings.Ruling_5: ceiling compression disclosure routes to Content Agent (no score change)

grade_movement_round2_to_round3.note: No grade changes between round-2 and round-3 (A:15 stable). The strip fix corrects ingredient text quality but the affected barcodes had simple ingredient lists in the BSIP0 scrape; their NOVA-2 was justified by the actual scraped data. Activia (7290112346797) removed from C count (21->20).
